notes: Official Bronx Zoo birthday party page, FAQ, contact page, and getting-here page fetched May 16, 2026. The official birthday-hero image from cdn.wcs.org was downloaded locally and uploaded via POST /api/ingest/upload so provider.image is stored on ImgBB.
missingOrUncertain: pricePerClass uses $1560, the published regular price for the Birthday Expedition package for up to 25 guests; Zoofari pricing, member pricing, and larger-party add-ons differ on the official page.

Neighborhood is mapped to canonical Fordham because the official Bronx Zoo address is 2300 Southern Boulevard in Bronx 10460 and the zoo's official getting-here page references nearby Fordham University for parking guidance.
rating and reviewCount are not published on the official source pages, so both are set to 0.

document.name: Bronx Zoo Birthday Parties
document.shortDescription: Weekend Bronx Zoo birthday packages with animal encounters, educator-led activities, and a morning expedition option that fills a scarce Bronx birthday-party slot.
document.longDescription:
The Bronx Zoo offers official children's birthday party packages with dedicated conservation educators, animal encounters, and full-day zoo admission for party guests. The birthday party page currently lists two weekend formats: the Birthday Expedition package, a 90-minute experience with an educator-led activity and animal guests, and the Zoofari Birthday Party package, which adds a private party space, scavenger hunt, activity stations, cupcakes, and optional catered food and drink.

The official page lists Birthday Expedition at $1,560 regular or $1,400 member for up to 25 guests, scheduled Saturdays or Sundays from 10:30 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. It lists Zoofari at $3,020 regular or $2,720 member for up to 35 guests, scheduled Saturdays or Sundays from 1:30 p.m. to 4:00 p.m. The FAQ says parties are generally offered Saturday and Sunday, encourages booking 3-4 months in advance, and notes that the Birthday Expedition is an outdoor experience while Zoofari includes a private party space.

For contact and planning, the official birthday page directs families to BZBirthdayParties@wcs.org or 718-741-7517 Tuesday through Friday from 9:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. The official contact and getting-here pages list Bronx Zoo at 2300 Southern Boulevard, Bronx, NY 10460.

Sources: https://bronxzoo.com/learn/families/birthday-parties https://bronxzoo.com/learn/families/birthday-parties/faq https://bronxzoo.com/contact https://bronxzoo.com/plan-your-visit/getting-here?buf=99999999 https://cdn.wcs.org/2022/07/25/5neygwcjm4_BZ_Birthday_Hero_072522_v3.jpg
document.announcementDescription: Official page lists a Saturday/Sunday Birthday Expedition package from 10:30 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. with animal encounters and full-day zoo admission.
